name: organism-lifecycle
purpose: Two agents that turn a vanilla brainstem into a full organism host: Twin (summon/hatch/boot/stop/list/inspect — full digital-twin lifecycle) + EggHatcher (universal .egg cartridge router that introspects manifest.schema/type and dispatches to organism / rapplication / session / neighborhood / estate). Both were kernel-shipped through 2026-05-10; relocated to RAR so the base install stays minimal and operators opt in when they're ready to host sub-twins or take in eggs. Drop both files into your brainstem's agents/ and restart.

twin_agent.py.purpose: Full digital-twin lifecycle in one drop-in agent. Source: agents/@rapp/twin_agent.py.

install.notes: Drop both files into your brainstem's agents/ directory and restart. The LLM picks up Twin(...) and HatchEgg(...) as tools on the next /chat request.
